calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-27-2022 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-01-2022 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-26-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kerry Riordan Sykes, via ZOOM, counsel for Irene Joe, via ZOOM, Petitioner.

At the outset the court asks counsel to confirm whether the document dated March 1, 2004 is a will or a codicil. Counsel reports that the document is a codicil and presents oral argument to support her verification. Following additional discussion, the court agrees with counsel and asks if there are any objections. None are presented. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated February 27, 2004 and Codicil dated March 1, 2004 is admitted to probate. Irene Joe is appointed as Executor of the estate with limited authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for June 21, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
